tweets.full_text:
Today we're shipping screen-aware dictation.

First, we built a speedy speech-to-text (very fast, ~450ms).

But, many products do this!

So we went further. Now dictate using your screen as context. In Claude Code, it writes the prompt. In G-Mail, it replies in your voice.

Demo: https://t.co/N5EZKJR5iR
tweets.summary: Anthropic推出屏幕感知语音输入功能，集成Claude Code和Gmail，可根据屏幕内容自动生成提示词或语音回复，语音转文字延迟仅450ms。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：首次实现屏幕感知语音输入
反常识/意外性：不只是快速语音转文字，而是理解屏幕上下文
angles: Anthropic终于做出了真正的「屏幕理解」语音输入
语音输入2.0：从转文字到理解上下文，Claude Code和Gmail实测
450ms延迟+屏幕感知，这才是AI语音交互的未来

America already made daylight saving time permanent once. In December 1973, 79% of Americans supported it and Nixon signed it into law. By February 1974, eight weeks into the experiment, support had collapsed to 42%. The policy never changed. Winter arrived.

Sunrise in
